dirMissing: Directory missing, unable to create console
inputPlaceholder: Type a message to send (paste images, @ search files, @/ search folders, drag & drop files), press Ctrl+Enter to send
detachedWindowHint: This window only hosts one tab
readyPlaceholder: # Terminal ready. Embedded console placeholder (UI prototype; no real PTY yet).
envFallbackMessage: The previous {from} environment is unavailable. Switched to {to}.
envFallbackWslStartFailed: WSL failed to start. Switched to {to}.
cliMissingMessage: {provider} CLI is not installed, or the current {env} environment cannot access the `{cli}` command.
childTerminalsPending: Sub-projects have completed tasks awaiting review

closeWorkingConfirm.title: Close active tab?
closeWorkingConfirm.desc: Terminal tab "{name}" is still working. Closing it will interrupt the current task/process. Continue?
closeWorkingConfirm.descNoName: This terminal tab is still working. Closing it will interrupt the current task/process. Continue?

closeInputConfirm.title: Close tab with unsent input?
closeInputConfirm.desc: Terminal tab "{name}" still has unsent input or attachments. Closing it will discard them. Continue?
closeInputConfirm.descNoName: This terminal tab still has unsent input or attachments. Closing it will discard them. Continue?

closeWorkingInputConfirm.title: Close active tab?
closeWorkingInputConfirm.desc: Terminal tab "{name}" is still working and has unsent input or attachments. Closing it will interrupt the current task/process and discard them. Continue?
closeWorkingInputConfirm.descNoName: This terminal tab is still working and has unsent input or attachments. Closing it will interrupt the current task/process and discard them. Continue?
